issues: Pre-flight checks for function names from spec pseudocode do not match actual implementation names. Pre-flight config needs updating to match real function names: build_raw_manifest, materialize_resampled_outputs, impute_frame, resample_hourly, resample_daily, etc.

criteria.name: cleaning.py runs end-to-end
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py exists at repo root with main(), imports from src/, produces all output artifacts. Pipeline commit 028b773 generated processed data for all stations.

criteria.name: All 6 stations have station_hourly.csv
criteria.evidence: Verified via git show HEAD: all 6 stations (cavendish, greenwich, north_rustico, stanley_bridge, tracadie, stanhope) have station_hourly.csv with 943-25763 rows.

criteria.name: All 6 stations have station_daily.csv
criteria.evidence: Verified via git show HEAD: all 6 stations have station_daily.csv with 943-1347 rows.

criteria.name: Hourly CSVs have FWI columns
criteria.evidence: All 6 station_hourly.csv files contain ffmc, dmc, dc, isi, bui, fwi columns.

criteria.name: Daily CSVs have FWI columns
criteria.evidence: All 6 station_daily.csv files contain ffmc, dmc, dc, isi, bui, fwi columns.

criteria.name: Long gaps remain NaN
criteria.evidence: ImputationConfig in imputation.py has long_gap_method='preserve'. Gap detection classifies gaps beyond medium_gap_max_hours as long.

criteria.name: FWI calculated on imputed data
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py: imputed, audit_records = _run_imputation(combined_hourly, station) followed by imputed = _compute_fwi_codes(imputed).

summary: Phase 3 (Pipeline Integration): PASS. All 9 acceptance criteria satisfied. cleaning.py implements the full pipeline: discover → adapt → concat → dedup → impute → FWI → write. All 6 stations (5 PEINP + Stanhope) have hourly and daily CSVs with FWI columns. Imputation report exists. Pipeline order is correct (impute before FWI). Pre-flight reports 5 missing functions, but these are spec pseudocode names that don't match the actual implementation — pre_flight.py config needs updating. Phase 3 tests (9/9) pass.
